heroDescription: Tongyi-MAI Z Image Turbo generates photorealistic text-to-image outputs quickly, with a LoRA option for custom styles or subjects.
seoDescription: Compare Z Image Turbo and Z Image Turbo LoRA on Novita AI for fast text-to-image generation and LoRA-guided image workflows.
overviewBody: Z-Image is an efficient image generation family from Tongyi-MAI, built around a 6B single-stream diffusion Transformer design.
Z-Image-Turbo is the fast distilled variant, designed for low-step text-to-image generation with strong photorealism, bilingual text rendering, and prompt adherence.
On Novita AI, this collection groups the available Z Image Turbo APIs, including the base Turbo endpoint and the LoRA-enabled endpoint.

lineupSections.title: Z Image Turbo
lineupSections.description: Z Image Turbo is the fast text-to-image model for photorealistic generation, bilingual prompts, and low-latency image creation.
items: Use Z Image Turbo for fast prompt-to-image generation and interactive creative iteration.
The Hugging Face model card and paper describe the Turbo variant as an 8-step distilled model.

lineupSections.title: Z Image Turbo LoRA
lineupSections.description: Z Image Turbo LoRA adds custom LoRA-weight support on top of the Turbo text-to-image workflow.
items: Use Z Image Turbo LoRA when generation should follow a custom style, product, character, or visual identity encoded in LoRA weights.
Official Tongyi-MAI Z-Image sources describe the base Turbo model; the LoRA API behavior is Novita-specific.

faq.question: Who developed Z Image?
faq.answer: Z-Image is from Tongyi-MAI/Alibaba, not Z.AI. The official Hugging Face model card lists Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo.

faq.question: What is Z Image Turbo best for?
faq.answer: Z Image Turbo is best for fast text-to-image generation, photorealistic outputs, bilingual English/Chinese text rendering, and interactive image workflows.

faq.question: What is the difference between Z Image Turbo and Z Image Turbo LoRA?
faq.answer: Z Image Turbo is the base fast text-to-image endpoint. Z Image Turbo LoRA adds support for applying custom LoRA weights through Novita's API.

models.name: z-image-turbo-lora
models.description: Generate images with Z Image Turbo while applying custom LoRA weights for style, subject, or brand-specific control.
